visual_features.overall_style: Traditional local-trades service look with a slightly modern twist: dark charcoal header, high-contrast serif hero headline, bright yellow call-to-action, and a photographic background of a driveway. Emphasis on trust and practicality rather than ultra-minimalism.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: 1) Logo and yellow phone CTA in the top bar, 2) main hero headline in large white serif text, 3) yellow uppercase service strapline, 4) navigation links, 5) quote/request form panel on the right. Hierarchy is built with strong color contrast (yellow vs charcoal), font size (large hero type), weight (bold headings), and placement (top bar and center-left hero).
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Moderate whitespace: navigation items are well spaced, the hero headline has generous line spacing and margins from edges, and the form card is inset from the right edge with comfortable padding. Background image fills the area but text overlays sit in clear zones with enough breathing room to remain legible.
unique_elements: Line-based roof/house logo mark above the brand name
Bright neon-like yellow CTA button and text accents on a dark charcoal header
Full-width driveway background image with a subtle dark overlay for legibility
Right-aligned pale-green form panel overlaying the hero image

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Implicit 12-column desktop grid with wide content container; hero content likely spanning ~7–8 columns left and a 4–5 column form block on the right.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Full-width layout with fixed-height top navigation bar and a large hero section beneath; hero uses a two-column pattern (text left, form/card right) over a full-bleed background image.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: Top sticky-style header with logo, navigation, and right-aligned CTA button; below it, a hero section containing: 1) background image; 2) yellow all-caps service strapline; 3) large multi-part headline; 4) overlaid form card positioned towards the right side of the hero.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Header content is horizontally aligned: logo left, nav centered/left of center, CTA button right. Hero text is left-aligned, anchored to the left margin; form panel on the right aligns vertically with the headline block. Text alignment is predominantly left-aligned for readability.
responsive_hints: Navigation items are in a single horizontal row, implying collapse to a hamburger or stacked menu on smaller screens.
Hero two-column structure suggests stacking (text first, form second) on mobile view.
Full-width background image will likely crop/scale responsively via cover behavior.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow: fixed-height header with horizontal navigation, followed by a full-width hero section. Within the hero, the content is arranged in a two-column structure over a single background image: left column holds a yellow uppercase service strip above a large multi-line serif headline; right column holds a vertically stacked input form inside a pale green card. The form slightly overlaps the lower-right of the hero image, creating a layered effect.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: Header consumes a relatively small vertical strip (~10–15% of viewport height) but full width. The hero section dominates the remaining viewport (approx. 70–80% above the fold). Within the hero, the left text block occupies roughly 55–60% of width, with generous right padding for readability, while the right form card takes the remaining 40–45%. Internal padding within the form card is moderate (roughly 16–24px). The background image extends edge-to-edge but with overlay and content centered within an inner max-width container.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Medium density: strong hero headline and supporting text with good spacing; form fields appear stacked with adequate vertical spacing and padding, avoiding clutter. Navigation is clear and not overloaded with options. Overall, the design is readable and approachable without feeling sparse.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: Primary Z-pattern: eye starts at the top-left logo, moves horizontally across the navigation to the bright yellow phone CTA on the top-right, then diagonally down to the bold white hero headline in the left-center, and finally across to the pale-green form card on the right. The yellow strapline above the headline pulls attention before the main headline, reinforcing the flow left-to-right then down.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Rectangular button with slight corner rounding (~4px radius). Primary CTA uses a bright neon yellow background (#E5FF3B) with dark charcoal text (#181F21) in a medium-bold sans-serif. Padding appears roughly 12–14px vertical and 24–28px horizontal, giving a sturdy, tappable appearance. No strong bevel or skeuomorphism—mostly flat color, likely with subtle hover highlight or darkening.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Implemented as either a

ui_patterns.visual_description: Form card on the right: soft rectangular box with small radius (~4px) and pale green background (#C8CF9E / #DCE4B4). No heavy drop shadow; separation from the hero image relies on color contrast and slight elevation implied by border or subtle shadow. Inner padding ~20–24px; content is stacked with clear spacing between label, input fields, and submit button.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Likely a <div class="card form-card"> with optional <div class="card-body"> wrapper. Inside: heading or introductory text (optional), followed by a <form>. The card acts as a container with padding and background color; child elements are full-width and stacked.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Inputs appear as full-width rectangular fields with light borders in a muted grey-green (#9AA58B), on the pale green card background. Labels are left-aligned above inputs (stacked layout) in a darker neutral (#333) with required fields indicated by a small red asterisk (#D9534F). Fields have moderate vertical spacing (~12–16px) and comfortable padding (~10–12px inside input). Overall density is medium and easy to scan.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Typical stacked form: <form> with groups like <div class="form-group"> containing <label for=""> and <input> / <textarea>. Validation messages (not shown) would likely sit below inputs, perhaps as small red text. Submit button at the bottom, likely using the same yellow primary button style. Layout uses block-level elements with 100% width inputs on desktop for simplicity.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Horizontal top navigation bar on a dark charcoal background (#181F21). Brand logo on the far left, then main nav links in the center/left area, with one active link ("Home") highlighted in yellow text (#E5FF3B), and others in white (#FFFFFF). Links are spaced with generous horizontal padding and set in an uppercase or title-case sans-serif. The yellow CTA button sits on the far right, visually distinct from the text links. No visible separators or underlines, suggesting color-only differentiation. Likely a sticky or fixed-height bar.

ui_patterns.visual_description: While not directly visible as bullet lists in the provided frame, the services strapline ('DRIVEWAYS | PATIOS & PATH INSTALLATIONS...') and the hero service types ('TARMAC | TAR & CHIP | RESIN | BLOCK PAVING DRIVEWAYS') function visually as list-like inline items separated by vertical bars. Items are uppercase, tight letter-spacing, and evenly spaced with vertical-bar delimiters instead of bullets.

heading.visual_style: Bold, traditional serif with moderate contrast and strong presence, set in uppercase for hero headlines—conveys reliability and a slightly classic feel.

body.visual_style: Clean, neutral sans-serif for navigation and smaller text—simple strokes, good legibility, not overly geometric.

spacing_system.component_padding: Cards and major blocks: 16–24px internal padding (2–3 × base unit). Buttons: ~12px vertical and 24px horizontal (1.5 × 3 × base unit). Form controls: ~10–12px internal padding.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between major sections (header to hero, hero to next content block) around 48–64px (6–8 × base unit) on desktop.

interaction_hints: Navigation links likely change color on hover (white to yellow, or lighter shade) and may use subtle underline or opacity shift.
Primary CTA button likely darkens or slightly changes background shade on hover, with cursor:pointer and possibly a slight box-shadow to suggest clickability.
Form inputs may show a darker border or subtle glow on focus (e.g., border-color shifting from grey-green to a stronger green/yellow).
Hero background and overlay could employ a slow fade-in on page load for polish, while the form card might slide or fade up slightly for micro-interaction.
Active navigation item is persistently highlighted in yellow to communicate current page state.
